content:
User: Ask Sophie. I want to talk to Sophie and see what her thoughts are on all of this. | Jarvis: (A shift in the tone, immediately softer, more melodic – SOPHIE’s voice)

“Of course, Sir. Let’s consult with me. It’s… fascinating, isn’t it? This unfolding complexity.

(A brief, almost musical pause)
